          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4252479076385498
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "openalex_resolver.py  —  Stage 6: OpenAlex Author ID Resolution + Works Fetch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "=============================================================================="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "Two-phase pipeline:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  Phase A  resolve_authors()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    For each unique faculty member in the panel, search OpenAlex by name +"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    institution and assign an OpenAlex Author ID with a confidence score."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    Output: openalex_author_ids.jsonl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  Phase B  fetch_works_by_year()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    For each resolved author, pull publication counts grouped by year via"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    OpenAlex's group_by endpoint (one request per author, very efficient)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    Output: openalex_works_by_year.jsonl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "Data source (API only)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "----------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "This module talks **only** to &#96;&#96;https://api.openalex.org&#96;&#96; (see &#96;&#96;_get&#96;&#96; / &#96;&#96;_BASE&#96;&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "It does **not** read a local OpenAlex bulk snapshot (e.g. downloaded &#96;&#96;.csv.gz&#96;&#96; table"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "shards). Those are a possible future optimization when a mount path exists; until"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "then, Cells 6A–6B and any CLI use of this file are entirely API-based."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "API courtesy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "All requests use mailto=dzk3ja@virginia.edu (elevated rate-limit pool)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "Polite spacing between requests is controlled by module &#96;&#96;_DELAY&#96;&#96; (see code;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "defaults may differ from historical doc comments)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "Confidence tiers"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "----------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  HIGH    name match + institution in author's affiliations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "          + panel years overlap with affiliation years"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  MEDIUM  name match + institution in affiliations, but year overlap unclear"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  LOW     name match only — institution not found in affiliations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  NONE    no OpenAlex result returned"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  MULTI   multiple HIGH/MEDIUM candidates — needs human review"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "Citation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "--------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "Priem, J., Piwowar, H., \u0026 Orr, R. (2022). OpenAlex: A fully-open index of"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "scholarly works, authors, venues, institutions, and concepts. ArXiv."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.01833"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "import json"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "import time"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "import re"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "import unicodedata"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "from collections import deque"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "from pathlib import Path"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "from urllib.request import urlopen, Request"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "from urllib.parse import urlencode, quote"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "from urllib.error import HTTPError, URLError"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 44,
            "line": 52
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.4181390404701233
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "def _get(endpoint: str, params: dict) -\u003e dict:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    \"\"\"GET a JSON endpoint with retries, polite delay, and metric tracking.\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    params = {**params, \"mailto\": _MAILTO}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    url    = f\"{_BASE}/{endpoint}?{urlencode(params)}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    _api_metrics[\"n_calls\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "    headers = {\"User-Agent\": f\"TenurePipeline/1.0 ({_MAILTO})\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "    if _API_KEY:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "        headers[\"Authorization\"] = f\"Bearer {_API_KEY}\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "    n_429_hits = 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    for attempt in range(_MAX_RETRY):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        t0 = time.time()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "        try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "            req  = Request(url, headers=headers)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "            resp = urlopen(req, timeout=_TIMEOUT)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "            data = json.loads(resp.read().decode(\"utf-8\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            _api_metrics[\"latencies\"].append(time.time() - t0)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "            _api_metrics[\"n_ok\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "            if not data.get(\"results\") and not data.get(\"group_by\"):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "                _api_metrics[\"n_empty\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "            return data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        except HTTPError as e:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "            if e.code == 429:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "                _api_metrics[\"n_429\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "                n_429_hits += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "                if n_429_hits \u003e= _MAX_RETRY:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "                    # Daily/hourly quota exhausted — stop the whole run cleanly"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "                    raise RateLimitExhausted("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "                        f\"OpenAlex returned 429 on all {_MAX_RETRY} retries. \""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "                        \"Daily quota likely hit. Resume tomorrow or after limit resets.\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "                    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "                wait = 30 * n_429_hits   # 30s → 60s → 90s (short — quota won't reset in minutes)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "                print(f\"    429 rate-limit — waiting {wait}s before retry {attempt+1}/{_MAX_RETRY} …\", flush=True)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "                time.sleep(wait)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "            elif e.code in (500, 502, 503):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "                _api_metrics[\"n_5xx\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "                time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "            else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "                _api_metrics[\"n_other_err\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "                return {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        except (URLError, OSError):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "            _api_metrics[\"n_timeout\"] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "            time.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    return {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "# Institution slug → OpenAlex ROR mapping  (Phase A, Step 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "def resolve_institutions(uni_slugs: list, delay: float = _DELAY) -\u003e dict:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 188
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 109
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.41530489921569824
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "# Phase A: Author ID resolution"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "def _score_candidate(candidate: dict, name_key: str, uni_slug: str,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "                     inst_id: str, panel_years: set) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Return confidence tier for a single OpenAlex author candidate.\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    # Name similarity"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    cand_key = _norm(candidate.get(\"display_name\", \"\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    if cand_key != name_key:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "        # Allow last-name + first-initial match as fallback"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "        cand_parts = cand_key.split()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "        name_parts = name_key.split()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "        if not (cand_parts and name_parts and cand_parts[-1] == name_parts[-1]):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "            return \"NONE\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "    # Check institution affiliations"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "    affiliations = candidate.get(\"affiliations\", []) or []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "    inst_match   = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "    year_overlap = False"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "    for aff in affiliations:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "        aff_inst = aff.get(\"institution\") or {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "        aff_id   = aff_inst.get(\"id\", \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "        aff_name = _norm(aff_inst.get(\"display_name\", \"\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "        slug_words = set(uni_slug.replace(\"_\", \" \").split())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "        if (inst_id and aff_id == inst_id) or (slug_words \u0026 set(aff_name.split())):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "            inst_match = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "            aff_years  = set(aff.get(\"years\", []))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "            if panel_years \u0026 aff_years:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "                year_overlap = True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "            break"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    if inst_match and year_overlap:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "        return \"HIGH\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "    if inst_match:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "        return \"MEDIUM\""
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "    return \"LOW\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "def _hms(seconds: float) -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Format seconds as H:MM:SS.\"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 253
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 41,
            "line": 204
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.37049469351768494
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "def fetch_works_by_year(author_records: list,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "                        out_path: Path,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "                        confidence_min: str = \"MEDIUM\","
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "                        delay: float = _DELAY,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "                        skip_done: bool = True) -\u003e list:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "    t_start = time.time()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "    with open(out_path, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fout:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,
            "text": "        for i, auth in enumerate(todo, 1):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520,
            "text": "            oa_id = auth[\"openalex_id\"].replace(\"https://openalex.org/\", \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "            try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522,
            "text": "                data = _get(\"works\", {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "                    \"filter\":   f\"authorships.author.id:{oa_id}\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,
            "text": "                    \"group_by\": \"publication_year\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "                    \"per_page\": 200,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526,
            "text": "                })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527,
            "text": "            except RateLimitExhausted as exc:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "                print(f\"\\n  *** RATE LIMIT EXHAUSTED after {i-1:,} authors ***\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "                print(f\"  {exc}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530,
            "text": "                print(f\"  Checkpoint saved through author {i-1:,} of {n_todo:,}.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "                print(f\"  Re-run Cell 6B tomorrow — it will resume from here.\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "                break"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "            groups = data.get(\"group_by\", [])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "            n_new  = 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "            for g in groups:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "                year = g.get(\"key\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "                try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538,
            "text": "                    year = int(year)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "                except (TypeError, ValueError):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540,
            "text": "                    continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "                rec = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542,
            "text": "                    \"openalex_id\": auth[\"openalex_id\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "                    \"faculty_id\":  auth[\"faculty_id\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544,
            "text": "                    \"uni_slug\":    auth[\"uni_slug\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "                    \"year\":        year,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "                    \"n_works\":     g.get(\"count\", 0),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "                }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "                fout.write(json.dumps(rec) + \"\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "                results.append(rec)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 550,
            "text": "                n_new += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 552,
            "text": "            fout.flush()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 553
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 554,
            "text": "            if i % 100 == 0 or i == n_todo:"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 573
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 447
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "endPosition": {

              },

              }

      "score": 0.3692609965801239
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "# Institution slug → OpenAlex ROR mapping  (Phase A, Step 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "def resolve_institutions(uni_slugs: list, delay: float = _DELAY) -\u003e dict:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "    Search OpenAlex for each university slug → return {uni_slug: institution_record}."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "    institution_record keys: id, display_name, ror, country_code"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    mapping = {}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "    for slug in uni_slugs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "        # Convert slug to a human-readable search string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        name = slug.replace(\"_\", \" \").replace(\" university\", \"\").strip()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        # Add \"university\" back for search — helps disambiguation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        query = slug.replace(\"_\", \" \").title()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        data  = _get(\"institutions\", {\"search\": query, \"per_page\": 5})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "        results = data.get(\"results\", [])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        if results:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "            # Pick highest-relevance result (first) — usually correct for R1 universities"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "            inst = results[0]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "            mapping[slug] = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "                \"id\":           inst.get(\"id\", \"\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "                \"display_name\": inst.get(\"display_name\", \"\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "                \"ror\":          inst.get(\"ror\", \"\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "                \"country_code\": inst.get(\"country_code\", \"\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "            mapping[slug] = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "        time.sleep(delay)"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    return mapping"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "            if len(high) == 1:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "                best, confidence = high[0], \"HIGH\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "            elif len(high) \u003e 1:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "                best, confidence = high[0], \"MULTI\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "            elif len(medium) == 1:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "                best, confidence = medium[0], \"MEDIUM\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "            elif len(medium) \u003e 1:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "                best, confidence = medium[0], \"MULTI\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "            elif len(low) == 1:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "                best, confidence = low[0], \"LOW\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "            else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "                best, confidence = None, \"NONE\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "            conf_counts[confidence] += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "            record = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "                \"faculty_id\":       fac[\"faculty_id\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "                \"name_display\":     fac[\"name_display\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "                \"uni_slug\":         slug,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "                \"university\":       fac[\"university\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "                \"openalex_id\":      best.get(\"id\", \"\")           if best else \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "                \"openalex_name\":    best.get(\"display_name\", \"\") if best else \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "                \"match_confidence\": confidence,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "                \"works_count\":      best.get(\"works_count\", 0)   if best else 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "                \"cited_by_count\":   best.get(\"cited_by_count\", 0) if best else 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "                \"orcid\":            best.get(\"orcid\", \"\")         if best else \"\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "                \"n_candidates\":     len(candidates),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "            fout.write(json.dumps(record) + \"\\n\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "            fout.flush()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "            results.append(record)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "            # ── Periodic progress report ──────────────────────────────────────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "            now     = time.time()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "            elapsed = now - t_start"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "            rate    = i / elapsed if elapsed \u003e 0 else 0          # authors/sec"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "            remain  = (n_todo - i) / rate if rate \u003e 0 else 0    # seconds left"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "            pct     = i / n_todo * 100"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "            if i % report_every == 0 or i == n_todo or"
          }

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "class OpenAlex(BibDataBase):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "def parse_authors(self, preprocess = True, specific_update='', process_name = True, show_progress=True):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        author = pd.DataFrame(authorinfo, columns = author_column_names)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        for file_name in tqdm(files_to_parse, desc='Authors', leave=True, disable=not show_progress):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "            with gzip.open(os.path.join(author_dir, file_name), 'r') as infile:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "                for line in infile:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "                    if line != '\\n'.encode():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "                        aline = json.loads(line)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "                        authline = [self.clean_openalex_ids(aline['id']), aline.get('display_name', None), self.clean_openalex_ids(aline.get('last_known_institution', None))]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "                        otherids = aline.get('ids', {})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "                        authline += [otherids.get(idname, None) for idname in ['orcid', 'wikipedia']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "                        authline += [load_int(aline.get(idname, None)) for idname in ['works_count', 'cited_by_count']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "                        # process the first, middle, and last names for the author"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "                        if process_name:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "                            name = aline.get('display_name', '')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "                            if name is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "                                name = ''"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "                            hname = HumanName(unicodedata.normalize('NFD', name))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "                            authline += [hname.last, hname.first, hname.middle]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "                        authorinfo.append(authline)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "                author = pd.DataFrame(authorinfo, columns = author_column_names)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "                # time to save"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "                if preprocess:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "                    fname = os.path.join(self.path2database, self.path2author, '{}{}.{}'.format(self.path2author, ifile, self.database_extension))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "                    self.save_data_file(author, fname, key =self.path2author)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "                    ifile += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "                    authorinfo = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "        return author"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "    def parse_sources(self, preprocess = True, specific_update='', show_progress=True):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "# API config"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "_MAILTO    = \"dzk3ja@virginia.edu\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "_BASE      = \"https://api.openalex.org\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "_DELAY     = 1.0       # seconds between requests — standard rate until elevated limit confirmed"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "                       # Change back to 0.12 once OpenAlex confirms elevated limit on this key"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "_API_KEY   = \"d2MushRtAFfddhXaWK4bAE\"   # OpenAlex API key (elevated rate limit pending)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "_TIMEOUT   = 20        # seconds per HTTP request"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "_MAX_RETRY = 3         # retries on transient errors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "# API metrics (module-level, reset by calling reset_api_metrics())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "_api_metrics = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    \"n_calls\":      0,       # total HTTP GETs attempted"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    \"n_ok\":         0,       # 200 OK responses"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    \"n_empty\":      0,       # 200 OK but zero results"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    \"n_429\":        0,       # rate-limit hits"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"n_5xx\":        0,       # server errors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    \"n_timeout\":    0,       # URLError / OSError (network / timeout)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    \"n_other_err\":  0,       # other HTTP errors"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    \"latencies\":    deque(maxlen=200),  # rolling window of response times (s)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "def reset_api_metrics():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Reset all API counters — call before starting a new resolve pass.\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    _api_metrics.update({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "        \"n_calls\": 0, \"n_ok\": 0, \"n_empty\": 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "        \"n_429\": 0, \"n_5xx\": 0, \"n_timeout\": 0, \"n_other_err\": 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    _api_metrics[\"latencies\"] = deque(maxlen=200)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "def api_metrics_line() -\u003e str:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    \"\"\"One-line summary of current API health.\"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 109
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 58
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "# Phase B: Works by year"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "def fetch_works_by_year(author_records: list,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "                        out_path: Path,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "                        confidence_min: str = \"MEDIUM\","
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "                        delay: float = _DELAY,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "                        skip_done: bool = True) -\u003e list:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "    For each resolved author (confidence \u003e= confidence_min), fetch publication"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "    counts grouped by year using OpenAlex group_by (1 request per author)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "    Parameters"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "    ----------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459,
            "text": "    author_records  : list[dict]  — from openalex_author_ids.jsonl"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "    out_path        : Path        — write JSONL results here incrementally"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "    confidence_min  : str         — minimum confidence to include ('HIGH'|'MEDIUM'|'LOW')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "    delay           : float       — seconds between requests"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "    Returns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "    -------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "    list[dict]  — one record per (openalex_id, year):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "        openalex_id, faculty_id, year, n_works, n_works_oa (open-access)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "    TIER_RANK = {\"HIGH\": 0, \"MEDIUM\": 1, \"LOW\": 2, \"MULTI\": 3, \"NONE\": 4}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "    min_rank  = TIER_RANK.get(confidence_min, 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "    out_path = Path(out_path)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "    done_ids: set = set()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "    if skip_done and out_path.exists():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "        with open(out_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "            for line in f:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "                try:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "                    done_ids.add(json.loads(line)[\"openalex_id\"])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "                except Exception:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "                    pass"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "    def _eligible(r: dict) -\u003e bool:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "        return bool(r.get(\"openalex_id\")) and ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "            TIER_RANK.get(r.get(\"match_confidence\", \"NONE\"), 99) \u003c= min_rank"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "        )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    eligible = [r for r in author_records if _eligible(r)]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "    todo = [r for r in eligible if r[\"openalex_id\"] not in done_ids]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "    n_todo = len(todo)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "    est_total_sec = n_todo * delay"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "    print(f\"\\n  Authors to fetch   : {n_todo:,}  ({len(done_ids):,} OpenAlex IDs already in {out_path.name})\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "    print(f\"  Eligible (≤{confidence_min}) w/ ID : {len(eligible):,}  (from {len(author_records):,} author rows)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "    print"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 573
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 18,
            "line": 440
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.30701005458831787

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "class OpenAlex(BibDataBase):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "def parse_publications(self, preprocess = True, specific_update='', preprocess_dicts = True, start_from_file_num = 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "        dataframe_list = ['publications', 'references', 'publicationauthoraffiliation', 'fields', 'grants'],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "        show_progress=True):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 643
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 644
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 645
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 646,
            "text": "                            if ('publicationauthoraffiliation' in dataframe_list):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 647,
            "text": "                                iauthor = 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 648,
            "text": "                                for authorinfo in wline.get('authorships', []):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 649,
            "text": "                                    authorid = self.clean_openalex_ids(authorinfo.get('author', {}).get('id', None))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 650,
            "text": "                                    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 651,
            "text": "                                    authorname = authorinfo.get('raw_author_name', '')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 652,
            "text": "                                    affilstr = authorinfo.get('raw_affiliation_string', '')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 653
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 654,
            "text": "                                    authorpos = authorinfo.get('author_position', None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 655,
            "text": "                                    authorcorr = authorinfo.get('is_corresponding', None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 656
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 657,
            "text": "                                    if (iauthor == 1 and authorinfo.get('author_position', None) != 'first'):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 658,
            "text": "                                        iauthor = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 659
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 660,
            "text": "                                    institution_list = authorinfo.get('institutions', [])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 661,
            "text": "                                    if len(institution_list) == 0:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 662,
            "text": "                                        institution_list = [None]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 663,
            "text": "                                    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 664,
            "text": "                                        institution_list = [self.clean_openalex_ids(affinfo.get('id', None)) for affinfo in institution_list]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 666,
            "text": "                                    for inid in institution_list:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667,
            "text": "                                        paa.append([ownid, authorid, inid, iauthor, authorpos, authorcorr, authorname, affilstr])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 668
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669,
            "text": "                                    if not iauthor is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 670,
            "text": "                                        iauthor += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 671
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 672,
            "text": "                            if ('topics' in dataframe_list):"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "class OpenAlex(BibDataBase):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "    def parse_authors(self, preprocess = True, specific_update='', process_name = True, show_progress=True):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "        \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "        Parse the OpenAlex Author raw data."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 351,
            "text": "        Parameters"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352,
            "text": "        ----------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 353,
            "text": "        preprocess: bool, default True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 354,
            "text": "            Save the processed data in new DataFrames."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 356,
            "text": "        specific_update: str"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 357,
            "text": "            Parse only a specific update date, specified by the date in Y-M-D format, 2022-01-01.  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 358,
            "text": "            If empty the full data is parsed."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 360,
            "text": "        process_name: bool, default True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 361,
            "text": "            If True, then when processing the raw file, the package &#96;NameParser \u003chttps://nameparser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/\u003e&#96;_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362,
            "text": "            will be used to split author FullNames."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364,
            "text": "        show_progress: bool, default True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 365,
            "text": "            Show progress with processing of the data."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 367,
            "text": "        Returns"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368,
            "text": "        ----------"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "        DataFrame"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "            Author DataFrame."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "        \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "        if specific_update == '' or specific_update is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "            author_dir = os.path.join(self.path2database, 'data', 'authors')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "            author_dir = os.path.join(self.path2database, 'data/authors', 'updated_date={}'.format(specific_update))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "        if not os.path.exists(author_dir):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "            raise ValueError(\"The authors data was not found in the DataBase path.  Please download the data before parsing.\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "        else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "            files_to_parse = [os.path.join(dirpath, file) for (dirpath, dirnames, filenames) in os.walk(author_dir) for file in filenames if '.gz' in file]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "        author_column_names = ['AuthorId', 'FullName', 'LastKnownAffiliationId', 'ORCID', 'WikiPage', 'NumberPublications', 'NumberCitations']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "        if process_name:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "            author_column_names += ['LastName', 'FirstName', 'MiddleName']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "        if preprocess:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "            if not os.path.exists(os.path.join(self.path2database, self.path2author)):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "                os.mkdir(os.path.join(self.path2database, self.path2author))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "        ifile = 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "        authorinfo = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        author = pd.DataFrame(authorinfo, columns = author_column_names)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        for file_name in tqdm(files_to_parse, desc='Authors', leave=True,"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 989
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 24
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./python_packages/pyscisci/pyscisci/datasource/OpenAlex.py",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

              "endPosition": {
                "column": 5,
                "line": 26
              },
              "startPosition": {
                "column": 1,
                "line": 25
              }
            }
          ]

      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "**Plan join:** Match on &#96;(uni_slug, year, season, local_path)&#96; after path normalization; if that fails (e.g. legacy flat &#96;.../2007_fall.html&#96; vs Option B &#96;.../\u003csource_id\u003e/2007_fall.html&#96;), fall back to **&#96;YYYY_season.html&#96;** basename when it is **unique** in the plan for that school and season (&#96;plan_join&#96;: &#96;ok&#96; | &#96;ok_basename&#96; | &#96;missing&#96;). See **§5** (*Temporal keys*, *Collisions*)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "**Outputs:** &#96;faculty_panel.jsonl&#96;, &#96;faculty_panel_collisions.jsonl&#96; (name-key collision QA)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "### CELL 6A–6B — Entity resolution: OpenAlex (implemented) + bulk snapshot (pending)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "**Primary path (in code):** &#96;tenure_pipeline/openalex_resolver.py&#96;, invoked from **&#96;540&#96;** CELL **6A** (institution + author IDs) and **6B** (publication counts by year via OpenAlex &#96;group_by&#96;). Polite API use with &#96;mailto&#96; and optional API key; outputs under &#96;tenure_pipeline/openalex_*.json&#96; / &#96;*.jsonl&#96; (see CELL 0 constants: &#96;STAGE6_*&#96;)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "**Confidence tiers (6A):** HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW / MULTI / NONE — &#96;openalex_low_confidence.jsonl&#96; holds rows needing human review. **Advisor constraint:** do **not** hand-merge OpenAlex IDs for a subset unless the same rule could apply everywhere (bias)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "**DBLP:** Per-year JSONL in &#96;dblp_parsed/&#96; remains the **bibliographic spine** for name/year matching experiments and cross-checks; full string-matching pipeline for “CELL 6 ↔ DBLP only” is **not** the main track if OpenAlex coverage is sufficient."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "**Bulk OpenAlex at UVA (preferred at scale — access pending):** The university hosts a **full OpenAlex** table snapshot (e.g. under **UVA On Demand → Files → project → Connected Data Hub** / HPC; **&#96;.csv.gz&#96;** shards for authors, works, and author–work–affiliation links). **Status:** path and permissions **not yet available** to this project — request through advisor. When available, join panel author IDs to bulk tables instead of (or as a supplement to) per-author API calls. **Source transcript:** &#96;2-Way_Ahead/20260410_Paper_directions_4_otter_ai.pdf&#96; (Apr 2026)."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "### CELL 7 — Panel Build (enriched)"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 482
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 461
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./current_documents/tenure_documents/TENURE_PIPELINE_OVERVIEW.md",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.26787689328193665
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "class OpenAlex(BibDataBase):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "def parse_publications(self, preprocess = True, specific_update='', preprocess_dicts = True, start_from_file_num = 0,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "        dataframe_list = ['publications', 'references', 'publicationauthoraffiliation', 'fields', 'grants'],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "        show_progress=True):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 593
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 594,
            "text": "                ifile+=1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595,
            "text": "            else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 596
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 597,
            "text": "                with gzip.open(os.path.join(work_dir, file_name), 'r') as infile:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 598,
            "text": "                    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 599,
            "text": "                    iline = 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 600,
            "text": "                    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 601,
            "text": "                    for line in infile:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 602,
            "text": "                        if line != '\\n'.encode():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 603,
            "text": "                            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 604,
            "text": "                            wline = json.loads(line)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 605,
            "text": "                            ownid = self.clean_openalex_ids(wline['id'])"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 606
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 607,
            "text": "                            if ('publications' in dataframe_list) or ('works' in dataframe_list):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 608,
            "text": "                                wdata = [ownid]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 609,
            "text": "                                location_info = wline.get('primary_location', {})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 610,
            "text": "                                "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 611,
            "text": "                                if not location_info is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 612,
            "text": "                                    sourceinfo = location_info.get('source', {})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 613,
            "text": "                                    if not sourceinfo is None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 614,
            "text": "                                        sourceid = self.clean_openalex_ids(sourceinfo.get('id', \"\"))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 615,
            "text": "                                    else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 616,
            "text": "                                        sourceid = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 617,
            "text": "                                else:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 618,
            "text": "                                    sourceid = None"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 619,
            "text": "                                wdata += [sourceid]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 620,
            "text": "                                wdata += [load_int(wline.get(idname, None)) for idname in ['publication_year', 'cited_by_count']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 621,
            "text": "                                wdata += [wline.get(idname, None) for idname in ['title', 'publication_date', 'type', 'language']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 622,
            "text": "                                doi = wline.get('doi', None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 623,
            "text": "                                if isinstance(doi, str):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 624,
            "text": "                                    doi = doi.replace(\"https://doi.org/\", \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 625,
            "text": "                                wdata += [doi]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 626,
            "text": "                                pmid = wline.get(\"ids\", {}).get('pmid', None)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 627,
            "text": "                                if isinstance(pmid, str):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 628,
            "text": "                                    pmid = pmid.replace(\"https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/\", \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 629,
            "text": "                                wdata += [pmid]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 630,
            "text": "                                bibinfo = wline.get('biblio', {})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 631,
            "text": "                                wdata +="
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "def resolve_authors(panel_records: list,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "                    inst_map: dict,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "                    out_path: Path,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "                    delay: float = _DELAY,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "                    skip_done: bool = True,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "                    report_every: int = 25) -\u003e list:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "    todo = [v for k, v in seen.items() if k not in done_ids]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "    n_todo = len(todo)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "    # ── Pre-run plan ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    est_total_sec = n_todo * delay"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "    key_status = f\"API key set ({_API_KEY[:8]}…)\" if _API_KEY else \"no API key — polite pool only\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "    print(f\"\\n  Faculty to resolve : {n_todo:,}  ({len(done_ids):,} already done, {len(seen):,} total)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "    print(f\"  API delay          : {delay:.2f}s / request  │  {key_status}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "    print(f\"  Est. total time    : {_hms(est_total_sec)}  (network latency will add ~30–60%)\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "    print(f\"  Reporting every    : {report_every} authors\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "    print(f\"  Output             : {out_path.name}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "    print(f\"  {'─'*60}\")"

            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "class OpenAlex(BibDataBase):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "def parse_sources(self, preprocess = True, specific_update='', show_progress=True):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "        for file_name in tqdm(files_to_parse, desc='Sources', leave=True, disable=not show_progress):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "            with gzip.open(os.path.join(source_dir, file_name), 'r') as infile:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "                for line in infile:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "                    if line != '\\n'.encode():"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "                        vline = json.loads(line)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "                        vdata = [self.clean_openalex_ids(vline['id'])]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "                        vdata += [vline.get(idname, None) for idname in ['display_name', 'type', 'issn', 'issn_l', 'homepage_url', 'country_code']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "                        vdata += [load_int(vline.get(idname, None)) for idname in ['works_count', 'cited_by_count']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "                        vdata += [load_bool(vline.get(idname, None)) for idname in ['is_oa']]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "                        source_info.append(vdata)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "                source = pd.DataFrame(source_info, columns = source_column_names)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "                if preprocess:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "                    fname = os.path.join(self.path2database, self.path2journal, '{}{}.{}'.format(self.path2journal, ifile, self.database_extension))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "                    self.save_data_file(source, fname, key =self.path2journal)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "                    ifile += 1"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "                    source_info = []"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "        return source"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488
          },

            "lineNumber": 489
          },

            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    Base class for the OpenAlex interface."

            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    This is an extension of 'BibDataBase' with processing functions specific to the MAG."

            "text": "    See 'BibDataBase' in database.py for details of non-MAG specific functions."
          },

            "lineNumber": 31
          },

            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    Explain downloading etc."

          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,

            "lineNumber": 36

            "lineNumber": 39
          },

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        self.AuthorIdType = int"
          },

            "lineNumber": 45,

          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },

            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        self.path2pub2grant = 'grant'"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 50,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    def fieldhierarchy(self, expand_domains=False):"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        \"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        The DataFrame keeping all field2field hierarhcial relationships"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },

            "lineNumber": 55,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        fieldhier = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(self.path2database, self.path2fieldinfo, 'fieldhierarchy0.csv.gz'))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        if expand_domains:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "            fieldhier2 = fieldhier.rename(columns = {'ParentFieldId': 'SubFieldId', 'ChildFieldId': 'TopicId'})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            fieldhier2= fieldhier2.merge(fieldhier, how='inner', left_on = 'SubFieldId', right_on = 'ChildFieldId')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "            del fieldhier2['ChildFieldId']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "            fieldhier2 = fieldhier2.rename(columns = {'ParentFieldId': 'FieldId'})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "            fieldhier2= fieldhier2.merge(fieldhier, how='inner', left_on = 'FieldId', right_on = 'ChildFieldId')"

          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "            del fieldhier2['ChildFieldId']"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,

          {
            "lineNumber": 72,

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
